name: Lofoten Links

course.viewDescription: Utsikt over Norskehavet, nordkanten av øya Gims øy med 360° panoramautsikt fra toppen Hoven. Unik arktisk landskap med fjellformasjoner.
course.viewDescription_en: Views over the Norwegian Sea, the northern edge of Gimsoy island with 360-degree panoramic views from the summit of Hoven. Unique Arctic landscape with mountain formations.

description: Verdensklasse golfbane med unik arktisk lokasjon på 68° nord, over polarsirkelen. Banen tilbyr 24-timers golfing under midnattssolen (mai-juli) og nordlysopplevelse (august-oktober). Hvite sandstrender, utsikt over Norskehavet, og helt unike golfopplevelser.

season.winterUse: Resepsjon åpen 22. oktober til 30. april på Låven Restaurant på Hov
season.winterUse_en: Reception open 22 October to 30 April at Laven Restaurant at Hov

facilities.simulatorType: Trackman simulator tilgjengelig for å spille banen under nordlyset

2026.greenFeeDescription: 2026 Early Birdie Booking: Non-Resort 18 hull: 2000 kr (mai 9-22, okt 5-18), 3000 kr (mai 23-okt 4). Midnight (19:15-02:00): +300/+500 kr. Resort Guests: 1400/2500 kr. Regional (Nordland/Troms/Finnmark medlemmer): 650/1150 kr. Junior (u19): 40% rabatt.
2026.notes: Pull trolley inkludert i greenfee. Resort guests: 9 hull og 24-timers pass kun i tillegg til min. en 18-hulls runde. Regionalt medlemskap krever fullt medlemskap i golfklubb i Nordland, Troms eller Finnmark.
2026.greenFeeDescription_en: 2026 Early Birdie Booking: Non-Resort 18 holes: 2,000 kr (9-22 May, 5-18 Oct), 3,000 kr (23 May-4 Oct). Midnight (19:15-02:00): +300/+500 kr. Resort Guests: 1,400/2,500 kr. Regional (Nordland/Troms/Finnmark members): 650/1,150 kr. Junior (u19): 40% discount.
2026.notes_en: Pull trolley included in green fee. Resort guests: 9 holes and 24-hour pass available only in addition to a minimum of one 18-hole round. Regional membership requires full membership in a golf club in Nordland, Troms or Finnmark.

description_en: World-class golf course with a unique Arctic location at 68 degrees north, above the Arctic Circle. The course offers 24-hour golfing under the midnight sun (May-July) and northern lights experiences (August-October). White sandy beaches, views over the Norwegian Sea, and utterly unique golf experiences.
